title: normanbokea valdeziana
intro: Normanbokea valdeziana, also known as the "Alpine Mint," is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the Philippines. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Normanbokea valdeziana include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparation of this plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
